verses.text: Ka sungah Topa' vangliatna hong om lamtak ka kiphawk a, ama kha in kei hong paipihin, misi guh tawh a kidimin a om kuampi khatah hong koih hi
Tua guhte lakah hong vakpih kawikawi a, tua guhte a tam mahmahna leh a keu mahmahna ka mu hi
Amah in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih misi guhte a nungtakik thei ding hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Kei zong, “Topa Pasian aw, hih thu nang bek in na thei ding hi,” ci-in ka dawng hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Hih guhte tungah thu hilh in la, hih guhkeute in Topa' thu a ngaihna dingun gen in
Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute tungah ka gen thu hih bangin gen in: Note sungah hu kong guan ding a, note kong nungtasak kik ding hi

Thagui leh sazang kong guan ding a, vun tawh kong tuam ding hi. Tua ciangin na sung uhah hu hong guan in kong nungtasak kik ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna nong thei ding uh hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin hong sawl bangin thu ka gen hi. Tua bangin thu ka gen laitakin a kigawi zuazua a ging ka za a, tua guhte khatlekhat kizomkik uh hi
Tua bangin ka et laitakin thagui leh sazang in tua guhte tuam a, tua ciangin a vun in zong hong tuam hi. Ahi zongin tua pumpite sungah hin'theihna hu om nailo hi

Tua ciangin amah in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, huihte tungah thu gen in la, hih a sisa pumpite sungah hu sangin a hingkiksak dingin mun khempeuh panin hong pai un, ci-in Topa Pasian in thu hong pia hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin hong sawl bangin ka gen hi. Tua pumpite sungah hin'theihna hu hong lut a, tua ciangin amaute hingin a khe-un hong ding uh hi. Galkap honpi khat zah pha-in tam mahmah uh hi
Tua ciangin Pasian in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite pen hih guhte tawh kibang uh hi. Amaute in, ‘I keucip a, i lamet ding bangmah om nawnloin i nuntakna guipi beita hi,’ ci uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin ka mi Israel-te tungah thu gen in la, Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Ka mite aw, tu-in note' hankhuk kong hon'sak ding a, note hong paikhiatpihin, Israel gam kong tun'pihkik ding hi
Note na kiphumna uh hankhuk hong hon'sakin kong paikhiatpih ciangin Topa ka hihna thu nong thei ding uh hi

Note sungah keima nuntakna hu kong guan ding a, note hong hingsak kikin, na gam uhah kong tengsak kik ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu nong thei ding uh hi. Hih bangin kong hihna ding thu ka kiciamzo a, ka kiciam bangin kong hih ding hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khinzo hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Judah leh Israel A Kigawmkikna ding Genkholhna

verses.text: Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, sing ciangkhut khat la in la a tungah, ‘Judah kumpi gam,’ ci-in gelh in. Tua ciangin adang khat la leuleu in la a tungah, ‘Israel kumpi gam,’ ci-in gelh leuleu in
Tua ciangin tua ciangkhutte gel ciangkhut khat a battheihna dingin na khutsungah tawikhawm in
Bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in na mipihte in hong dot uh ciangin

amaute kiangah, Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Israel ciangkhut la-in Judah ciangkhut tawh ka koihkhawm ding hi. Tua ciangkhut nihte ciangkhut khatin ka bawl ding a, ka khutsungah ka tawi ding hi, ci hi, ci-in gen in
“Tua na gelh ciangkhut nihte mite' muhin na khutsungah tawi-in
amaute kiangah, Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Amaute' omna minam dangte' lak panin Israel mite la-in ka kaikhawm ding a, amaute' gamah ka paipihkik ding hi
Israel mualtung gamah, amaute minam khatin ka gawmkik ding hi. Amaute a uk ding kumpi khat nei ding uh a, amaute minam nihin kikhen nawnlo ding uh a, kumpi gam nihin zong kikhen nawnlo ding uh hi

Amaute pen a muhdahhuai milimte tawh kininsak nawnlo ding uh a, mawhnate tawh zong kininsak nawnlo ding uh hi. Amaute' mawhna leh kei hong lehheknate panin ka suaktasak ding hi. Amaute a siangtho mi-in ka bawl ding a, amaute keima mi hi-in, kei, amaute' Pasian ka hi ding hi
Ka nasempa David pen amaute' kumpi hi ding a, mi khat' ukna nuai-ah amaute kigawmin, ka thukhamte hoihtakin zui ding uh hi

A pu a pate uh a ten'nasa ahi ka nasempa Jakob tungah ka piak leitangah amaute teng ding uh a, amaute bek hiloin a suan a khak dongun tengsuak ding uh hi. Ka nasempa David in amaute uk tawntung ding hi
Amaute lungmuangin a om tawntungna ding uh thuciamna khat ka bawl ding a, amaute thupha pia-in a mi ka pungsak ding hi. Amaute' lakah a om tawntung dingin ka biakinnpi ka phut ding hi
Amaute tawh tengkhawmin, amaute' Pasian ka hi ding a, amaute pen keima mite hi ding uh hi
Amaute' lakah a om tawntung dingin ka biakinnpi ka koih ciangin, Topa ahi keimah in keima mi dingin Israel mite ka bawl khitna thu, minam dangte khempeuh in thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi.
